title: Auto-update, AI-STEALTH v5, EXIF map search
items: Auto-update via Service Worker — pulsing UPDATE button appears in sidebar when new version is ready, one click applies it
AI-STEALTH v5: 5-preset pipeline system — LITE / STANDARD / GHOST / MAX / DENOISE with visual pill selector
GHOST preset: adaptive photon noise + INTER_AREA/LANCZOS4 destructive resampling + double-shift JPEG (pixel-shift 4px, DCT grid desync)
MAX preset: all techniques combined — radial aberration + adaptive+PRNU noise + destructive resample + double-shift JPEG + EXIF
DENOISE preset: NLM denoising via OpenCV (Non-local Means) for cleanup / post-process
Range sliders (Radial Aberration, Sensor Noise, Freq Break) now correctly display and pass 0 (off)
EXIF-SNIPER map: city/country search via Nominatim OSM (no API key), flyTo animation
EXIF-SNIPER map: 24 popular city chips — London, Paris, Berlin, Tokyo, NYC, Dubai and more

title: ID Lab expansion — FR-CNI, PT-ID-MRZ, NL/POL/EST/LVA
items: FR-CNI generator: YY+MM+dept+service+serial → 13-char code, ICAO 7-3-1 checksum, RND/CLR/CPY, localStorage history
PT-ID-MRZ: Portuguese Bilhete de Identidade TD1 MRZ — NIC Modulo-11 check digit, correct composite checksum
Portugal in ID Lab: pt_id_mrz tool + MRZ Passport
Netherlands: NL-BSN inline widget (elfproef Mod-11), removed incorrect MRZ ID CARD
Poland: PESEL inline widget (century-encoded DOB, gender serial, weighted CD) + Doc Dates widget
Estonia: Isikukood inline widget — gender+century prefix (1–6), two-round Mod-11 control digit
Latvia: Personas Kods inline widget — DDMMYY-NNNC format, weights [1,6,3,7,9,10,5,8,4,2]

title: ID Lab — ITA Codice Fiscale + DEU Steuer-ID
items: Italian Codice Fiscale generator: surname/name encoding, DOB+gender, Belfiore municipality code, 16-char output
Code 39 barcode export (transparent PNG, 2740×383)
German Steuer-ID: 11-digit, ISO 7064 Mod-11,10 inline widget in ID Lab card
ID Lab country cards redesign with inline widget support

title: UK DL Gen — full document data & card preview
items: Three card revisions: EU (2015–21) with EU circle + Welsh text, 2021–23 post-Brexit pink, 2023+ blue Royal Crest
Full document data block — issue/expiry dates, card serial (Luhn), categories, address (field 8)
Standard 10yr vs Group 2 HGV/Bus 5yr validity with correct date ranges per revision
Generation history — last 10 sessions saved to localStorage with one-click full restore
Random UK address generation from dedicated address pool (uk-dl-addresses.ts)
SVG card preview fixed at 350px width — no layout jump on address change
Sidebar UNITED KINGDOM group added

title: MRZ Forge — Manual Intelligence
items: Manual data integrated for 30+ countries — doc number formats, personal number formats, validity periods
Document number generator rewritten per country manuals
INFO overlay — doc number format, personal number spec and notes per country
FONTS overlay — lists exact fonts used in each country's document
MANUAL_VALID badge — validates generated doc number against manual rules
Expiry autofill — one-click fills expiry date based on country standard validity
Personal number generator expanded to 30+ countries: BSN, PESEL, CPF, NINo, TFN, personnummer, HETU, INSEE, Codice Fiscale, EGN, OIB, EMŠO, AMKA, PPS, Steuer-ID and more
PWA / Offline mode — service worker caches app shell and flag images for 30 days

title: MRZ Forge & Revolut upgrades
items: Country flags in nationality/issuer selector (flagcdn.com, cross-platform)
Two-column layout — input left, MRZ output + history right, no scroll needed
Generation history — last 5 results with one-click field restore
RANDOM and CLEAR buttons for quick data fill
Auto document number generator per country (Europe + USA/CAN/AUS/BRA)
Custom Transaction toggle in Revolut — set merchant, amount, date manually
Updates news feed on dashboard

title: Initial Release
items: MRZ Forge — universal MRZ generator (TD1, TD2, TD3, MRV-A)
Revolut statement generator with scan mode
AI Bypass — image compression with quality scoring
EXIF Cleaner with GPS map preview
Face Cut tool
Irish NDLS MRZ, Dutch & French MRZ generators
Energia bill generator
